allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse src -File | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("$PWD\\",""\) }; Write-Output "---PUBLIC---"; if \(Test-Path public\) { Get-ChildItem -Recurse public -File } else { "no public dir" }; Write-Output "---NEXTCONFIG---"; Get-Content next.config.mjs -Raw)
